home.noModules.zh: 您还没有配置任何模块，请添加您的第一个模块
home.noModules.en: You haven't configured any modules yet. Please add your first module.

dyform.preOrPend.prependText.helpMsg.zh: 输入框前面显示的固定文本
dyform.preOrPend.prependText.helpMsg.en: Fixed text displayed in front of the input box

dyform.preOrPend.prependList.helpMsg.zh: 配置输入框前面的下拉选项
dyform.preOrPend.prependList.helpMsg.en: Configure dropdown options in front of the input box

dyform.preOrPend.appendText.helpMsg.zh: 输入框后面显示的固定文本
dyform.preOrPend.appendText.helpMsg.en: Fixed text displayed after the input box

dyform.preOrPend.appendAction.helpMsg.zh: 配置输入框后面的操作按钮
dyform.preOrPend.appendAction.helpMsg.en: Configure action buttons after the input box

dyform.preOrPend.appendList.helpMsg.zh: 配置输入框后面的下拉选项
dyform.preOrPend.appendList.helpMsg.en: Configure dropdown options after the input box

dyform.preOrPend.warning.prependConflict.zh: 前缀文本和前缀下拉列表不能同时配置
dyform.preOrPend.warning.prependConflict.en: Prefix text and prefix dropdown list cannot be configured simultaneously

dyform.preOrPend.warning.appendConflict.zh: 后缀文本、后缀操作按钮和后缀下拉列表不能同时配置
dyform.preOrPend.warning.appendConflict.en: Suffix text, suffix action button and suffix dropdown list cannot be configured simultaneously

login.forget.password.tip.zh: 请输入您注册时使用的邮箱地址，我们将向该邮箱发送密码重置链接。
login.forget.password.tip.en: Please enter the email address you used when registering, and we will send a password reset link to that email.

loginButton.description.zh:
StarHorse DevOps是一个企业级开发运维和全栈低代码开发平台！潜心打造强大核心技术底座：内置元数据引擎、业务流程引擎、业务触发器、可视化表单。
                                Sql查询、代码生成、CMDB、数据建模、数据可视化、报表、仪表盘、工作流、权限管理、消息推送、文件管理等功能一应俱全！

userCenter.checkEmailReset.zh: 请检查您的邮箱并按照指示重置密码。
userCenter.checkEmailReset.en: Please check your email and follow the instructions to reset your password.

flow.designer.delNode.confirm.tips.zh: 删除节点后，该节点的所有子节点将被删除，确认删除？
flow.designer.delNode.confirm.tips.en: Delete this node will delete all the child nodes

dyform.preview.validate.failure.zh: 表单验证失败，请检查输入
dyform.preview.validate.failure.en: Form validation failed, please check your input

dyform.designer.instruction.zh: 请从左侧组件库中选择一个组件，然后用鼠标双击或者拖动该组件放置于此处
dyform.designer.instruction.en: Please select a component from the left component library, then double-click or drag the component to place it here

dyform.help.designerDescription.zh: 表单设计器是一款通过拖拽即可实现复杂表单模型，可满足大部分常见业务
dyform.help.designerDescription.en: Form Designer is a tool that can implement complex form models through drag and drop, which can meet most common business needs

dyform.help.rule1.zh: 所有同级组件的名字不能重复，在Tab组件中tabName和objectName不能重复
dyform.help.rule1.en: All sibling component names cannot be duplicated. In Tab components, tabName and objectName cannot be duplicated

dyform.help.rule2.en: In Table components, batchFieldName cannot be duplicated

dyform.help.step1.zh: 在左边拖动或者双击组件可添加到中间设计舞台
dyform.help.step1.en: Drag or double-click components on the left to add them to the middle design stage

dyform.help.step2.zh: 在右边属性区域设置选中组件得属性
dyform.help.step2.en: Set properties of selected components in the right property area

dyform.help.step3.zh: 在头部可批量编辑按钮可编辑属性名称
dyform.help.step3.en: Use the batch edit button in the header to edit property names

dyform.help.step4.zh: 在头部设置按钮可设置表单属性
dyform.help.step4.en: Use the settings button in the header to set form properties

dyform.help.step5.zh: 在头部代码按钮可以生成代码（目前只能生成vue3）
dyform.help.step5.en: Use the code button in the header to generate code (currently only Vue3)

dyform.help.step6.zh: 在头部预览按钮可以预览表单信息
dyform.help.step6.en: Use the preview button in the header to preview form information

dyform.help.step7.zh: 在舞台上点击鼠标右键可打开右键菜单
dyform.help.step7.en: Right-click on the stage to open the context menu

dyform.help.blindSpots.zh: 盲点（数据源生成的表单模型）
dyform.help.blindSpots.en: Blind spots (form models generated by data sources)

dyform.help.blindSpot1.zh: 须注意选择器、单选框、多选框等组件的值类型，系统默认是字符串类型，如果数据库设置是数值类型需要在对应字段的属性面板中修改值类型
dyform.help.blindSpot1.en: Note the value types of selector, radio box, checkbox and other components. The system default is string type. If the database setting is numeric type, you need to modify the value type in the corresponding field's property panel

dyform.help.blindSpot2.zh: 提交时须注意表的主键生成策略，默认是动态赋值，如果是自增，需要在保存时修改主键策略
dyform.help.blindSpot2.en: When submitting, pay attention to the primary key generation strategy of the table. The default is dynamic assignment. If it is auto-increment, you need to modify the primary key strategy when saving

dyform.batch.edit.commonFieldsMessage.zh: 在配置或者提交功能里设置
dyform.batch.edit.commonFieldsMessage.en: Set in configuration or submission function

dyform.js.editor.customEvent.zh: 自定义事件,提供了如下系统参数
dyform.js.editor.customEvent.en: Custom events provide the following system parameters

dyform.js.editor.parametersMethods.zh: 具体参数或方法切换Tab查看
dyform.js.editor.parametersMethods.en: Specific parameters or methods, switch tabs to view

dyform.js.editor.formInstance.validate.zh: 对整个表单的内容进行验证。 接收一个回调函数，或返回
dyform.js.editor.formInstance.validate.en: Validate the contents of the entire form. Receives a callback function, or returns

dyform.js.editor.formInstance.resetField.zh: 重置该表单项，将其值重置为初始值，并移除校验结果
dyform.js.editor.formInstance.resetField.en: Reset the form item, reset its value to the initial value, and remove the validation result

dyform.js.editor.formInstance.clearValid.zh: 清理某个字段的表单验证信息。
dyform.js.editor.formInstance.clearValid.en: Clear form validation information for a field.

dyform.params.warning.primaryKey.en: Please select the primary key field

continuous.is.alone.zh: 是否独占 1是 2否 默认2

continuous.auto.build.zh: 是否自动触发构建 1是 2否 默认2

system.password.length.zh: 请设置长度为6到15的密码
system.password.length.en: Please set a password with length between 6 and 15

system.password.mismatch.zh: 两次密码不一致，请重新录入
system.password.mismatch.en: Passwords do not match, please re-enter

dbsearch.connect.database.first.en: Connect to database before executing SQL

dbsearch.max.sql.count.en: Maximum 5 SQL statements can be executed at once

dbsearch.currently.shortcuts.disabled.zh: 目前快捷键失效,提示表字段需先单击表名加载字段到本地
dbsearch.currently.shortcuts.disabled.en: Currently shortcuts are disabled, table fields need to be loaded by clicking table name first

dbsearch.connect.database.before.use.zh: 使用前需先连接数据库;如果在左侧下拉框中,无数据或者无您要连接的DB,请联系管理员配置并授权
dbsearch.connect.database.before.use.en: Connect to database before use; if there is no data or your DB in the left dropdown, please contact admin to configure and authorize

dbsearch.sql.executor.theoretically.supp.zh: Sql查询器理论上支持数据库的所有DDL,DML,DCL等操作,但基于合规性,请在配置数据库的时候慎重赋予操作权限
dbsearch.sql.executor.theoretically.supp.en: SQL executor theoretically supports all DDL, DML, DCL operations of the database, but based on compliance, please be careful when granting operation permissions when configuring the database

dbsearch.recommend.not.execute.time.cons.zh: 建议不要执行耗时的Sql,容易被网关拦截
dbsearch.recommend.not.execute.time.cons.en: It is recommended not to execute time-consuming SQL, which is easy to be intercepted by the gateway

dbsearch.recommend.add.semicolon.zh: 建议每条Sql写完后加上,以方便多条sql拆分
dbsearch.recommend.add.semicolon.en: It is recommended to add, after each SQL is written to facilitate multi-SQL splitting

dbsearch.default.each.sql.return.ten.rec.zh: 默认每条Sql 一次最多返回10条数据,页面支持最大返回100条配置
dbsearch.default.each.sql.return.ten.rec.en: By default, each SQL returns a maximum of 10 records at a time, and the page supports a maximum return of 100 records configuration

dbsearch.each.time.max.execute.five.sql.zh: 每次最多执行的Sql数不能超过5条,超过数量取前5条
dbsearch.each.time.max.execute.five.sql.en: The maximum number of SQL that can be executed each time cannot exceed 5, and the first 5 will be taken if exceeded

dbsearch.executor.supports.selected.sql.zh: 执行器支持选中某条Sql进行执行
dbsearch.executor.supports.selected.sql.en: The executor supports executing selected SQL

codegen.currently.only.support.java.zh: 目前只支持Java,选择其它语言会构建失败
codegen.currently.only.support.java.en: Currently only supports Java, choosing other languages will cause build failure

codegen.this.property.empty.zh: 该属性为空表示生成所有数据库表的代码,如果表数量太多（>100），程序自动转异步执行，有构建失败风险.
codegen.this.property.empty.en: If this property is empty, code will be generated for all database tables. If there are too many tables (>100), the program will automatically switch to asynchronous execution with build failure risk.

codegen.if.this.property.empty.zh: 如果该属性为空，所生成的文件会带上表前缀，eg: 表：dev_userinfo ,生成的文件是DevUserinfo.java;多个前缀请用英文分号（;）隔开。
codegen.if.this.property.empty.en: If this property is empty, the generated files will include table prefixes. eg: Table: dev_userinfo, generated file: DevUserinfo.java; Multiple prefixes should be separated by semicolons (;).

codegen.empty.generate.all.types.zh: 为空生成所有类型文件

codegen.field.visible.columns.zh: 字段可见列数大于指定值时触发表单分组,默认不分组
codegen.field.visible.columns.en: Form grouping is triggered when visible columns exceed the specified value, no grouping by default

codegen.form.page.group.columns.zh: 表单页面分组列数，默认2
codegen.form.page.group.columns.en: Form page grouping columns, default is 2

codegen.maven.project.module.name.zh: Maven 项目的模块名会追加到包名的后面
codegen.maven.project.module.name.en: Maven project module name will be appended to package name

codegen.config.file.application.name.en: Corresponds to spring.application.name in application.yml config file

codegen.config.file.server.port.en: Corresponds to server.port in application.yml config file

codegen.files.deploy.server.directory.zh: 文件部署到服务器上的目录
codegen.files.deploy.server.directory.en: Directory where files are deployed on server

codegen.pom.xml.packaging.en: Corresponds to packaging in pom.xml file

codegen.pom.xml.version.en: Corresponds to version in pom.xml file

codegen.ui.files.business.files.zh: UI文件和业务文件是否放在同一个module里面
codegen.ui.files.business.files.en: Whether UI files and business files are placed in the same module

codegen.dto.files.business.files.zh: DTO文件和业务文件是否放在同一个module里面
codegen.dto.files.business.files.en: Whether DTO files and business files are placed in the same module

dyform.params.warning.displayFields.zh: 请至少配置一个显示字段
dyform.params.warning.displayFields.en: Please configure at least one display field

dyform.shortcut.warning.selectComponentT.zh: 请先选择要复制的组件
dyform.shortcut.warning.selectComponentT.en: Please select a component to copy first

dyform.shortcut.warning.selectComponentT.zh: 请先选择要剪切的组件
dyform.shortcut.warning.selectComponentT.en: Please select a component to cut first

flex.design.share.load.failure.zh: 分享链接已失效或不存在
flex.design.share.load.failure.en: Share link has expired or does not exist

system.flex.saveDialog.placeholder.descr.zh: 请描述该设计的用途和特点（可选）
system.flex.saveDialog.placeholder.descr.en: Please describe the purpose and features of this design (optional)

system.flex.publishDialog.placeholder.de.zh: 请描述本次发布的主要内容和变更
system.flex.publishDialog.placeholder.de.en: Please describe the main content and changes of this release

system.flex.publishDialog.title.validati.zh: 发布前需要修复以下问题：
system.flex.publishDialog.title.validati.en: The following issues need to be fixed before publishing:

system.flex.publishDialog.message.valida.zh: 设计验证失败，无法发布

system.flex.publishDialog.message.rollba.zh: 确定要回滚到此版本吗？
system.flex.publishDialog.message.rollba.en: Are you sure you want to rollback to this version?

system.flex.publishDialog.message.urlCop.zh: 发布链接已复制到剪贴板

system.flex.shareDialog.rule.passwordPro.zh: 保护模式下必须设置密码
system.flex.shareDialog.rule.passwordPro.en: Password must be set in protected mode

system.flex.shareDialog.rule.passwordLen.en: Password must be at least 4 characters

system.flex.shareDialog.message.shareSuc.zh: 分享链接已复制到剪贴板

system.flex.shareDialog.message.codeSucc.zh: 分享码已复制到剪贴板

system.flex.shareDialog.message.shareCon.zh: 分享内容已复制到剪贴板

system.flex.pageItemProperties.alert.des.zh: 请确保输入有效的 JSON 格式

system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.zh: 选择接口调用的系统环境
system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.en: Select the system environment for API calls

system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.zh: 请输入IP地址、域名或服务名
system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.en: Please enter IP address, domain, or service name

system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.zh: 接口服务器的IP地址、域名或服务名
system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.en: IP address, domain, or service name of the API server

system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.zh: 是否启用定时自动刷新数据
system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.en: Whether to enable automatic data refresh

system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.zh: 自动刷新数据的时间间隔，单位为秒
system.apiConfig.createApiConfigProperti.en: Time interval for automatic data refresh, in seconds

system.apiConfig.validateApiConfig.refre.zh: 刷新间隔必须在5-3600秒之间
system.apiConfig.validateApiConfig.refre.en: Refresh interval must be between 5-3600 seconds

system.flexbox.containerConfig.display.h.zh: 定义布局类型，例如 flex 或 block。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.display.h.en: Defines the layout type, such as flex or block.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.flexDirec.zh: 指定项目布局的主轴方向。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.flexDirec.en: Specifies the main axis direction of item layout.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.flexWrap..zh: 决定项目是否换行或多行排列。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.flexWrap..en: Determines whether items wrap or arrange in multiple lines.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.justifyCo.zh: 沿主轴对齐项目，控制水平间距。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.justifyCo.en: Align items along the main axis, controlling horizontal spacing.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.alignItem.zh: 沿交叉轴对齐项目，影响垂直排列。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.alignItem.en: Align items along the cross axis, affecting vertical arrangement.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.alignCont.zh: 定义换行时弹性线之间的间距。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.alignCont.en: Defines spacing between flex lines when wrapping.

system.flexbox.containerConfig.gap.helpM.zh: 指定容器内弹性项目之间的间距。
system.flexbox.containerConfig.gap.helpM.en: Specifies spacing between flex items in the container.

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.order.helpMsg.zh: 指定项目在容器中的排列顺序
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.order.helpMsg.en: Specifies the arrangement order of items in the container

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexGrow.help.zh: 定义项目相对于其他项目的扩展比例
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexGrow.help.en: Defines the growth ratio of items relative to other items

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexShrink.he.zh: 控制空间不足时项目的收缩比例
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexShrink.he.en: Controls the shrink ratio of items when space is insufficient

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexBasis.hel.zh: 定义空间分配前项目的初始尺寸
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.flexBasis.hel.en: Defines the initial size of items before space allocation

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.alignSelf.hel.zh: 覆盖容器对齐设置，单独定义项目交叉轴对齐
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.alignSelf.hel.en: Override container alignment settings, define cross-axis alignment for individual items

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.width.helpMsg.zh: 指定项目宽度，覆盖默认尺寸
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.width.helpMsg.en: Specify item width, overriding default size

system.flexbox.itemsConfig.height.helpMs.zh: 指定项目高度，覆盖默认尺寸
system.flexbox.itemsConfig.height.helpMs.en: Specify item height, overriding default size

system.grid.containerConfig.display.help.zh: 定义容器的布局类型，例如 grid 或 block。
system.grid.containerConfig.display.help.en: Defines the layout type of the container, such as grid or block.

system.grid.containerConfig.gridTemplate.zh: 指定网格的列结构，包含尺寸和单位
system.grid.containerConfig.gridTemplate.en: Specifies the column structure of the grid, including size and units

system.grid.containerConfig.gridTemplate.zh: 指定网格的行结构，包含尺寸和单位
system.grid.containerConfig.gridTemplate.en: Specifies the row structure of the grid, including size and units

system.grid.containerConfig.gap.helpMsg.zh: 定义网格行与列之间的间距
system.grid.containerConfig.gap.helpMsg.en: Defines the spacing between grid rows and columns

system.grid.containerConfig.justifyItems.zh: 控制网格单元格内项目的水平对齐方式
system.grid.containerConfig.justifyItems.en: Controls the horizontal alignment of items within grid cells

system.grid.containerConfig.alignItems.h.zh: 控制网格单元格内项目的垂直对齐方式
system.grid.containerConfig.alignItems.h.en: Controls the vertical alignment of items within grid cells

system.grid.containerConfig.justifyConte.zh: 控制项目在容器内的水平分布方式
system.grid.containerConfig.justifyConte.en: Controls the horizontal distribution of items within the container

system.grid.containerConfig.alignContent.zh: 控制项目在容器内的垂直分布方式
system.grid.containerConfig.alignContent.en: Controls the vertical distribution of items within the container

system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoColu.zh: 定义网格自动生成列的默认宽度
system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoColu.en: Defines the default width of automatically generated columns in the grid

system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoRows.zh: 定义网格自动生成行的默认高度
system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoRows.en: Defines the default height of automatically generated rows in the grid

system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoFlow.zh: 控制项目在网格中的自动排列方式
system.grid.containerConfig.gridAutoFlow.en: Controls the automatic arrangement of items in the grid

system.grid.itemsConfig.gridColumn.helpM.zh: 定义元素在网格中的起始和结束列
system.grid.itemsConfig.gridColumn.helpM.en: Defines the start and end columns of an element in the grid

system.grid.itemsConfig.gridRow.helpMsg.zh: 定义元素在网格中的起始和结束行
system.grid.itemsConfig.gridRow.helpMsg.en: Defines the start and end rows of an element in the grid

system.grid.itemsConfig.justifySelf.help.zh: 控制元素在网格容器内的水平对齐方式
system.grid.itemsConfig.justifySelf.help.en: Controls the horizontal alignment of an element within the grid container

system.grid.itemsConfig.alignSelf.helpMs.zh: 控制元素在网格容器内的垂直对齐方式
system.grid.itemsConfig.alignSelf.helpMs.en: Controls the vertical alignment of an element within the grid container

system.grid.itemsConfig.width.helpMsg.zh: 指定元素宽度，包含单位选项
system.grid.itemsConfig.width.helpMsg.en: Specifies the width of the element, including unit options

system.grid.itemsConfig.height.helpMsg.zh: 指定元素高度，包含单位选项
system.grid.itemsConfig.height.helpMsg.en: Specifies the height of the element, including unit options

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.validation.zh: 设计数据验证失败，请检查设计内容
system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.validation.en: Design data validation failed, please check the design content

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.publishVal.zh: 设计数据验证失败，无法发布
system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.publishVal.en: Design data validation failed, cannot publish

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.shareValid.zh: 设计数据验证失败，无法分享
system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.shareValid.en: Design data validation failed, cannot share

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.autoSaveSe.zh: 设置自动保存，每5分钟保存一次
system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.autoSaveSe.en: Set up auto save, save every 5 minutes

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.beforeUnlo.zh: 监听页面卸载，自动保存
system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.beforeUnlo.en: Listen for page unload, auto save

system.flex.starHorseFlexComp.cleanup.en: Clean up resources when component is destroyed

system.flex.starHorseDesign.rightPanel.e.zh: 点击画布中的组件或者连线可设置属性
system.flex.starHorseDesign.rightPanel.e.en: Click on components or lines in the canvas to set properties

system.flex.starHorseEditor.autoCompleti.zh: Post 请求接口 默认异步返回
system.flex.starHorseEditor.autoCompleti.en: Post request interface, returns asynchronously by default

system.flex.starHorseEditor.autoCompleti.zh: Get 请求接口 默认异步返回
system.flex.starHorseEditor.autoCompleti.en: Get request interface, returns asynchronously by default

system.flex.starHorseEditor.generateQuer.zh: 根据不同数据库生成不同的查询提示
system.flex.starHorseEditor.generateQuer.en: Generate different query tips based on different databases

system.flex.shDesign.help.step1.zh: 编辑其打开后可将左边的组件拖到中间网格画布区域；
system.flex.shDesign.help.step1.en: After opening the editor, you can drag components from the left to the middle grid canvas area;

system.flex.shDesign.help.step2.zh: 鼠标移动组件上会出现四个圆圈，移动到圆圈上鼠标会变成实心的十字，按下鼠标左键拖动会出现连线，连线可链接到其他组件的圆圈上；
system.flex.shDesign.help.step2.en: When you move the mouse over a component, four circles will appear. When you move the mouse over a circle, it will turn into a solid cross. Pressing the left mouse button and dragging will create a connection line that can be linked to circles on other components;

system.flex.shDesign.help.step3.zh: 单击组件或者连线选中该都组件或者连线；
system.flex.shDesign.help.step3.en: Click on a component or connection line to select it;

dyform.formula.helpMsg.en: When enabled, the field value is automatically calculated by formula and cannot be manually input

dyform.formula.type.aggregate.desc.zh: 如 sum / avg / count / min / max
dyform.formula.type.aggregate.desc.en: e.g. sum / avg / count / min / max

dyform.formula.type.condition.desc.zh: 多分支条件返回不同值

dyform.formula.type.format.desc.input.zh: 千分位 / 正则替换 / 左填充

dyform.formula.type.lookup.desc.en: Fill target fields based on source field value

dyform.formula.type.dateCalc.desc.zh: 日期差值 / 偏移 / 格式化

dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.calc.zh: 使用 ${fieldName} 引用字段值，支持 + - * / 运算及 Math 函数
dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.calc.en: Use ${fieldName} to reference field values, supports + - * / and Math functions

dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.concat.zh: 使用 ${fieldName} 引用字段值，支持混合固定文本
dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.concat.en: Use ${fieldName} to reference field values, supports mixed fixed text

dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.ternar.zh: 格式：条件 ? 真值 : 假值，条件中用 ${fieldName} 引用字段
dyform.formula.expression.helpMsg.ternar.en: Format: condition ? trueValue : falseValue, use ${fieldName} in condition

dyform.formula.branch.then.placeholder.zh: 匹配时返回的值，支持 ${fieldName} 引用

dyform.formula.defaultValue.placeholder..zh: 条件不满足时的兜底值
dyform.formula.defaultValue.placeholder..en: Fallback value when condition not met

dyform.formula.lookup.values.placeholder.zh: 回填目标字段的 JSON，如 {\

dyform.formula.lookup.helpMsg.en: Match key by dependent field (sourceFields[0]) value, fill values into form

dyform.formula.aggregate.field.placehold.zh: 子表单中要聚合的字段名
dyform.formula.aggregate.field.placehold.en: Field name to aggregate in sub-form

dyform.formula.aggregate.field.helpMsg.en: Select sub-form data source (array) in sourceFields, enter the field name to aggregate here

dyform.formula.dateCalc.offset.placehold.en: Positive for forward, negative for backward

dyform.props.quickConfig.cols.helpMsg.zh: 栅格容器特殊性,只能设置备选值
dyform.props.quickConfig.cols.helpMsg.en: Grid container only supports preset values

dyform.props.maxLength.helpMsg.zh: 长度超过4000，后台自动转为文本类型如：text,clob等
dyform.props.maxLength.helpMsg.en: If length exceeds 4000, the backend will automatically convert to text type such as text, clob, etc.

dyform.props.dataSource.helpMsg.zh: 配置当前属性的备选数据项
dyform.props.dataSource.helpMsg.en: Configure data items for the current property

dyform.props.dataRelation.helpMsg.zh: 当前属性数据改变，控制表单内其他属性的数据范围及操作行为
dyform.props.dataRelation.helpMsg.en: When current property data changes, control the data range and operation behavior of other properties in the form

dyform.props.prototypeDisplay.helpMsg.zh: 如果设置为true，组件值将原样显示，不进行任何处理，主要使用在数据列表
dyform.props.prototypeDisplay.helpMsg.en: If set to true, the component value will be displayed as-is without any processing, mainly used in data lists

dyform.props.uniqueValid.helpMsg.zh: 如果开启此功能，\n在新增数据时系统对数据进行唯一性校验。
dyform.props.uniqueValid.helpMsg.en: If enabled, the system will perform uniqueness validation when adding new data.

dyform.formProp.publicFields.helpMsg.zh:
配置系统公共字段:
 控制公共字段是否显示在页面对于的位置
dyform.formProp.publicFields.helpMsg.en:
Configure system public fields:
 Control whether public fields are displayed at the corresponding positions on the page

dyform.formProp.dbName.helpMsg.zh:
动态创建的表需要存在那个数据库，
如果为空，则在当前业务数据库创建表信息。
dyform.formProp.dbName.helpMsg.en:
The database where the dynamically created table needs to exist.
If empty, the table will be created in the current business database.

dyform.formProp.relationField.helpMsg.zh: 对于关联字段的处理，\n将编码或者ID 映射为对应的名称显示。
dyform.formProp.relationField.helpMsg.en: Processing of associated fields,\nMapping codes or IDs to corresponding names for display.

dyform.formProp.cascadeDelete.helpMsg.zh: 页面字段删除时同步删除数据库对应表字段
dyform.formProp.cascadeDelete.helpMsg.en: Synchronously delete corresponding table fields in the database when page fields are deleted

dyform.formProp.cloneData.helpMsg.zh: 将表单模型和权限等在上面选中数据库中生成相同的数据,\n目标数据库上必须要有所需的表，将克隆失败
dyform.formProp.cloneData.helpMsg.en: Generate the same form model and permission data in the selected database above,\nThe target database must have the required tables, otherwise cloning will fail

dyform.formProp.hideRequiredAsterisk.zh: 隐藏必填字段的红色星号

dyform.formProp.scrollToError.zh: 校验失败时，滚动到第一个错误表单项
dyform.formProp.scrollToError.en: Scroll to First Error on Validation Failure

dyform.formProp.showValidateIcon.zh: 是否在输入框中显示校验结果反馈图标
dyform.formProp.showValidateIcon.en: Show Validation Result Icon in Input

dyform.formProp.showErrorMessage.zh: 是否显示校验错误信息

dyform.formProp.inlineMessage.zh: 是否以行内形式展示校验信息

dyform.formProp.validateOnRuleChange.zh: 是否在 rules 属性改变后立即触发一次验证

dyform.formProp.statusDict.helpMsg.zh: 系统字段中配置的类型编码
dyform.formProp.statusDict.helpMsg.en: Type code configured in system fields

dyform.formProp.displayAlias.helpMsg.zh: 关联字段与主表字段冲突时配置,\n必须以字母开头不能有特殊符号

dyform.formProp.displayAlias.validate.zh: 必须以字母开头不能有特殊符号
dyform.formProp.displayAlias.validate.en: Must start with a letter and cannot contain special symbols

dyform.formProp.requestUrl.helpMsg.zh: 请求接口：填写接口地址， 例如：/userdb-manage/xx/xx/xx;\n页面跳转：填写前端路由，例如：/test/UserInfo;\n弹窗：填写弹窗组件名称，例如：UserInfo。
dyform.formProp.requestUrl.helpMsg.en: API Request: Fill in the API address, e.g. /userdb-manage/xx/xx/xx;\nPage Jump: Fill in the frontend route, e.g. /test/UserInfo;\nDialog: Fill in the dialog component name, e.g. UserInfo.

dyform.utils.507.en: Disable linked field when equal to specified value

dyform.utils.508.zh: 等于指定值时可编辑被关联字段
dyform.utils.508.en: Enable linked field editing when equal to specified value

dyform.utils.509.en: Hide linked field when equal to specified value

dyform.utils.511.en: Linked field required when equal to specified value

dyform.utils.512.zh: 等于指定值时被关联字段赋予新值
dyform.utils.512.en: Assign new value to linked field when equal to specified value

dyform.utils.513.zh: 满足条件触发数据联动
dyform.utils.513.en: Trigger data linkage when condition is met

dyform.utils.514.zh: 数据作为参数触发数据联动
dyform.utils.514.en: Trigger data linkage with data as parameter

dyform.utils.515.zh: 数据等于指定值时被关联字段改变字段类型
dyform.utils.515.en: Change linked field type when data equals specified value

dyform.utils.519.zh: 相同的属性不能配置到多个相同的控制条件中，\n否则后面的条件会覆盖前面的条件,导致数据联动失效
dyform.utils.519.en: Same attribute cannot be configured in multiple identical control conditions,otherwise later conditions will override earlier ones, causing data linkage failure

dyform.utils.521.zh: 作为查询条件时的参数名
dyform.utils.521.en: Parameter name when used as query condition

dyform.utils.523.zh: 作为触发事件的匹配值；\n控制条件为数据作为参数触发数据联动时，没有选中则所有数据都作为联动参数，\n否则只有选中的才会作为联动参数
dyform.utils.523.en: Match value for trigger event;When control condition is data as parameter, if not selected, all data will be used as linkage parameter,otherwise only selected data will be used

dyform.utils.547.zh: 如果开启此功能，查询区域的此组件默认展示，\n否则需要点击高级查询时才会展示
dyform.utils.547.en: If enabled, this component is displayed by default in the query area,otherwise it will only be displayed when advanced query is clicked

dyform.utils.549.zh: 在列表上原样显示组件,\n此属性开启可能会导致列表数据加载缓慢
dyform.utils.549.en: Display component as-is in the list,enabling this may cause slow list data loading

dyform.utils.551.zh: 可指定显示为什么组件
dyform.utils.551.en: Can specify which component to display as

dyform.utils.553.zh: 如果开启此功能，\n在新增数据时系统对数据进行唯一性校验。
dyform.utils.553.en: If enabled, the system validates data uniqueness when adding new data.

dyform.utils.570.en: Number of columns per row, effective when display mode is grid

dyform.utils.596.en: Path parse: only parse sub-paths under project public, format: test/*.svg,Function parse: only parse parameterless functions under src/api/star_horse_utils.ts, format: analysisData

dyform.utils.dbList.fieldCompTypesMsg.zh:
类型操作提示：
1、系统默认将数字类型的字段映射为数字输入框组件；
   将字符串类型的字段映射为单行文本框组件；
   将日期类型映射为日期选择器组件；
2、如果字段有特色业务需要，则可以将字段配置为对应的组件类型

dyform.utils.dbList.configMsg.zh:
操作指引：
1、此处配置主要是对字段展示方式,排除字段和组件类型做配置；
1、表字段在添加到舞台前需要做配置，配置好后再拖入舞台，
   否则配置不生效；
3、其他细节配置需要在舞台中进行处理

dyform.preps.urlReturnDataHelpMsg.zh: 接口返回的数据格式必须是：\n{\
dyform.preps.urlReturnDataHelpMsg.en: The API response format must be:\n{\

dyform.preps.tabNameHelp.zh: 默认作为tab组件的名称，\n当设置对应关系时,系统作为表的主键
dyform.preps.tabNameHelp.en: Used as the tab component name by default,\nwhen mapping is set, used as the table primary key

dyform.preps.collapseNameHelp.zh: 默认作为Collapse组件的名称，\n当设置对应关系时,系统作为表的主键
dyform.preps.collapseNameHelp.en: Used as the Collapse component name by default,\nwhen mapping is set, used as the table primary key

dyform.preps.splitterNameHelp.zh: 默认作为Splitter组件的名称，\n当设置对应关系时,系统作为表的主键
dyform.preps.splitterNameHelp.en: Used as the Splitter component name by default,\nwhen mapping is set, used as the table primary key

dyform.preps.cardNameHelp.zh: 默认作为Card组件的名称，\n当设置对应关系时,系统作为表的主键
dyform.preps.cardNameHelp.en: Used as the Card component name by default,\nwhen mapping is set, used as the table primary key

dyform.valid.dupTabName.zh: Tab组件中tabName 名{names}重复，请在容器对应属性面板【基础属性->编辑容器属性】中检查所有Tab组件
dyform.valid.dupTabName.en: Duplicate tabName {names} in Tab component, please check all Tab components in the container property panel [Basic Properties -> Edit Container Properties]

dyform.valid.dupObjectName.zh: Tab组件中objectName 名{names}重复，请在容器对应属性面板【基础属性->编辑容器属性】中检查所有Tab组件
dyform.valid.dupObjectName.en: Duplicate objectName {names} in Tab component, please check all Tab components in the container property panel [Basic Properties -> Edit Container Properties]

dyform.valid.dupBatchName.zh: Table组件中集合名称{names}重复，请在容器对应属性面板【个性化属性->集合名称】中检查所有Table组件
dyform.valid.dupBatchName.en: Duplicate batch name {names} in Table component, please check all Table components in the container property panel [Custom Properties -> Batch Name]

dyform.sample.confirmDelete.zh: 确认需要删除选择的数据吗？
dyform.sample.confirmDelete.en: Are you sure you want to delete the selected data?

dyform.sample.apiError.zh: 接口不存在或网络异常:
dyform.sample.apiError.en: API not found or network error:

dyform.sample.systemParamHelp.zh: 系统参数创建后，请不要随便删除或者修改，\n否则可能导致系统功能异常
dyform.sample.systemParamHelp.en: After system parameters are created, please do not delete or modify them casually,\notherwise it may cause system function abnormalities

dyform.condition.containerRemark.zh: 支持无限层级嵌套的条件组容器
dyform.condition.containerRemark.en: Condition group container with unlimited nesting levels

dyform.condition.confirmDeleteChild.zh: 确定要删除该子条件及其所有子节点吗？
dyform.condition.confirmDeleteChild.en: Are you sure you want to delete this sub-condition and all its child nodes?
